title: Infosys and Anthropic announce strategic collaboration for enterprise AI solutions
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Anthropic to develop and deliver enterprise AI solutions across telecommunications, financial services, manufacturing, and software development. The collaboration will begin in telecommunications through a dedicated Anthropic Center of Excellence focused on building and deploying industry-specific AI agents. Infosys will integrate Anthropic's Claude models, including Claude Code, with Infosys Topaz AI offerings to automate complex workflows, accelerate software delivery, support agentic AI solutions, and help regulated enterprises adopt AI with governance and transparency. The companies also plan to support legacy system modernization using Infosys Topaz and Claude.
